message:
feat: Add zero-copy GPU dequantization for Qwen2.5-32B inference

Implement heterogeneous pipelining inference engine that runs
Qwen2.5-Coder-32B (34.8GB Q8_0) on 32GB Mac using Apple Silicon
unified memory.

Key changes:
- Add GGUF loader with mmap for zero-copy tensor access
- Add Metal GPU dequantization kernels (Q8_0 → BF16)
- Implement streaming engine with ping-pong double buffering
- Use deviceNewBufferNoCopy for true zero-copy GPU access
- Add MmapQ8Pointers struct for direct mmap pointer passing

Performance results:
- CPU load: 1,513ms → 11ms/layer (137x faster)
- GPU reads directly from mmap'd GGUF file
- Bottleneck is now purely SSD bandwidth (~400MB/s)

Architecture:
  mmap (GGUF) → GPU dequant (zero-copy) → BF16 buffer → GPU compute

The GPU dequant time (~1.3s/layer) now includes page fault latency
when reading cold pages from SSD. For resident (cached) pages,
true GPU dequant speed is ~50ms/layer.
